sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84740" key="poluda/hr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-δάηρ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ερος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n84740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having many brothersin-law,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0057.tlg029:1:48" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.48</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
